auth.label: API Key
auth.description: FireHydrant API key sent as a Bearer token. Create one from Settings > API Keys in FireHydrant, documented at https://docs.firehydrant.com/docs/api-keys.

actions.name: create_incident
actions.description: Create a FireHydrant incident using a JSON-friendly request body.

labels.description: FireHydrant labels keyed by label name.

tagList.description: Tags to attach to the incident.

conditionId.description: The severity matrix condition ID for the impact.

impacts.description: Impacted infrastructure to attach to the incident.

teamIds.description: Team IDs to assign to the incident.

restricted.description: Whether the incident should be restricted.

skipIncidentTypeValues.description: Whether to skip values copied from the incident type.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a FireHydrant incident.

anyOf.description: When the incident was last updated.

raw.description: The raw object returned by FireHydrant.

anyOf.description: FireHydrant labels keyed by label name.

raw.description: The raw object returned by FireHydrant.
The raw object returned by FireHydrant.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when creating a FireHydrant incident.

actions.name: list_environments
actions.description: List FireHydrant environments with pagination and search filters.

perPage.description: The number of records to request per page. FireHydrant allows up to 200.

query.description: A free-text query to search matching records.

name.description: A name query to search matching records.

actions.name: list_incidents
actions.description: List FireHydrant incidents with stable pagination and common filters.

perPage.description: The number of records to request per page. FireHydrant allows up to 200.

query.description: A text query that searches incident name, summary, and description.

name.description: A query to search incidents by name.

status.description: The incident status to filter by.

services.description: A comma-separated list of service IDs, or is_empty for incidents with no impacted services.

environments.description: A comma-separated list of environment IDs, or is_empty for incidents with no impacted environments.

createdAtOrAfter.description: Only return incidents created at or after this time.

createdAtOrBefore.description: Only return incidents created at or before this time.

updatedAfter.description: Only return incidents updated after this time.

updatedBefore.description: Only return incidents updated before this time.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing FireHydrant incidents.

anyOf.description: When the incident was last updated.

raw.description: The raw object returned by FireHydrant.
The raw object returned by FireHydrant.

anyOf.description: FireHydrant labels keyed by label name.

raw.description: The raw object returned by FireHydrant.

anyOf.description: The total number of matching records.
The number of records returned on this page.
The total number of available pages.

raw.description: The raw object returned by FireHydrant.
The raw object returned by FireHydrant.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing FireHydrant incidents.
